  • Software is

    eating the world, but AI is going to eat software.

    Jensen Huang

    CEO, NVIDIA

  • AI is the symbiote. Makes you stronger, better, faster.

    Varun Mayya

    Founder, Entrepreneur

  • By leveraging AI, we can not only retire our drudgery work, but we can now also amplify our ‘uphill’ thinking, taking on greater challenges and achieving unprecedented heights.

    John Maeda

    Chief Experience Officer, Sapient

  • AI will be the greatest force for economic empowerment and a lot of people getting rich we have ever seen.

    Sam Altman

    CEO, OpenAI

  • AI will not just be a new tool, it will be a fundamental shift in how all technology is built and used.

    Marc Andreessen

    VC, Andreessen Horowitz

SUCCESS STORY

SUCCESS STORY

BUILT AN AI WORKFORCE. SECURED ₹1 CRORE IN FUNDING.

BUILT AN AI WORKFORCE. SECURED ₹1 CRORE IN FUNDING.

Muskan launched MuzeCMO (formerly AgentProd), a customizable AI sales and marketing assistant that automates daily outreach, content generation, and client tasks for agencies.

Muskan launched MuzeCMO (formerly AgentProd), a customizable AI sales and marketing assistant that automates daily outreach, content generation, and client tasks for agencies.

Muskan Sinha

Founder, MuzeCMO

PARTNERSHIPS AND AI LITERACY

PARTNERSHIPS AND AI LITERACY

AI LITERACY PARTNERSHIP: WORKING WITH OPENAI & META

MY ROADMAP

MY ROADMAP

Meet your instructors and fellow builders in a live session to kickstart your GenAI mastery.

DIFFUSION MODULE

Master the latest Generative AI models. Learn how to create, edit, and fine-tune state-of-the-art AI visuals using ComfyUI and industry-leading tools

week 1 – week 7

Orientation and History of GenAI, Tensor Art

Diffusion and Introduction to SDXL & Comfyui

Controlnet, IP adapters, Advanced Image Workflows, & Introduction to Flux Models.

Flux Tools, Models, and Qwen Image Model

Flux Lora Training and Wan Video model

Video Inpainting, Outpainting and Video controlnets

Infinite talk, HuMo Model [Video plus audio]

Wan Animate and Advanced Video workflows

Deploying Models to Replicate: The Production Pipeline.

llm module {code / no code}

LLM Deepdive

technical founders

data scientists, technical founders

100X INSTRUCTORS

100X INSTRUCTORS

THe people behind 100xengineers

THe people behind 100xengineers

THe people behind 100xengineers

THe people behind 100xengineers

Our instructors have been at the forefront of GenAI since the beginning. They built companies, scaled products, and trained thousands. Now they’re here to guide you.

Our instructors have been at the forefront of GenAI since the beginning. They built companies, scaled products, and trained thousands. Now they’re here to guide you.

Our instructors have been at the forefront of GenAI since the beginning. They built companies, scaled products, and trained thousands.

Now they’re here to guide you.

SRIDEV RAMESH

CO-FOUNDER & CEO, 100XENGINEERS

- GenAI educator and marketer known for scaling AI learning programs. - Built award-winning courses and led tech communities. - Served as an ex-Teaching Fellow for CS50 at Harvard.

9+ years of exp

SRIDEV RAMESH

CO-FOUNDER & CEO, 100XENGINEERS

- GenAI educator and marketer known for scaling AI learning programs. - Built award-winning courses and led tech communities. - Served as an ex-Teaching Fellow for CS50 at Harvard.

9+ years of exp

SIDDHANT GOSWAMI

CO-FOUNDER & CTO, 100XENGINEERS

- Built and scaled three products to over $10 million in revenue. - Trained more than 50,000 students in generative AI and large language models. - Achieved two successful exits to Unacademy.

9+ years of exp

SIDDHANT GOSWAMI

CO-FOUNDER & CTO, 100XENGINEERS

- Built and scaled three products to over $10 million in revenue. - Trained more than 50,000 students in generative AI and large language models. - Achieved two successful exits to Unacademy.

9+ years of exp

PRANAY PRAJAPATI

LEAD INSTRUCTOR, 100XENGINEERS

- Specializes in building generative AI solutions and engineering AI for enterprises. - Co-founder of Nexi Labs, an AI agency that delivers personalized AI content and workflow automation projects.

5+ years of exp

PRANAY PRAJAPATI

LEAD INSTRUCTOR, 100XENGINEERS

- Specializes in building generative AI solutions and engineering AI for enterprises. - Co-founder of Nexi Labs, an AI agency that delivers personalized AI content and workflow automation projects.

5+ years of exp

TEJAS THOLPADI

LEAD INSTRUCTOR, 100XENGINEERS

- Co-founder of Aeos Labs and Ex-CTO of Avalon Labs. - Experienced technology leader and AI innovator. - Built impactful AI solutions, including "God in a Box," and actively mentors engineers.

10+ years of exp

Challenging, but absolutely worth the effort. The program does require commitment and time, but that’s also why it delivers real depth. If you’re serious about learning GenAI properly, this cohort pushes you in the right way.

Challenging, but absolutely worth the effort. The program does require commitment and time, but that’s also why it delivers real depth. If you’re serious about learning GenAI properly, this cohort pushes you in the right way.

The course was fascinating in showing how AI plays a role in full stack applications. The instructors were great at breaking things down and making complex topics easy to understand. I rate the course a solid 9 out of 10.

This Is For You?

Everything you need to know about
the course and payments.

Everything you need to know about
the course and payments.

Everything you need to know about
the course and payments.

What distinguishes this Applied GenAI cohort from others, like those focused on ChatGPT?

What distinguishes this Applied GenAI cohort from others, like those focused on ChatGPT?

What will I learn in the 24-week GenAI cohort?

You'll master a range of skills including Python, LangChain, Large Language Models (LLMs), Hugging Face, fine-tuning AI models, and dataset management. The course combines 150+ hours of learning through live classes, pre-recorded lectures, and project-based learning.

What will I learn in the 24-week GenAI cohort?

You'll master a range of skills including Python, LangChain, Large Language Models (LLMs), Hugging Face, fine-tuning AI models, and dataset management. The course combines 150+ hours of learning through live classes, pre-recorded lectures, and project-based learning.

Who is the ideal candidate for this cohort?

Who is the ideal candidate for this cohort?

What type of projects will I work on during the cohort?

What type of projects will I work on during the cohort?

Will I receive a certification upon completing the course?

Will I receive a certification upon completing the course?

How does this cohort prepare me for the current job market?

How does this cohort prepare me for the current job market?

How long is this cohort for?

How long is this cohort for?
